arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Brighton team news LIVE!
arts.sum: Spurs could well finish 17th and set all manner of unwanted records with a 22nd league defeat of the season this afternoon, but the mood will still be a celebratory one at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. What a week it has been for Tottenham after Europa League glory in Bilbao on Wednesday ended their 17-year silverware drought - and the celebrations will continue today with the trophy to be paraded at full-time of their final game of the season against Brighton in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Europa League winners Tottenham Hotspur welcome Brighton & Hove Albion to north London this afternoon. On Wednesday night, Tottenham edged out Manchester United in the European final in Bilbao. Ange Postecoglou fulfilled his prophecy by ending Spurs’ 17-year trophy drought in his second season in charge. The Lilywhites haven’t prepared for this afternoon’s contest in […] The post Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: Arsenal’s WCL glory | Sunderland up | Dons win Cup Live scores | Fixtures | Tables | And get in touch It’s 20 years since Istanbul: just say the word and everyone knows what you’re talking about.
